zh.Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特梅爾波利 布布
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Allex Buckler於大約1516年出生在英國多瑟特梅爾波利 布布時，他的父親John Buckler II37歲，母親Agnes Barber37歲。他於大約1538年與Margaret Martyn在英國英格蘭戴文米爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1567年3月30日在英國多瑟特享年52歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特列可姆。

zh-hans.Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特梅爾波利 布布
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Allex Buckler于大约1516年出生在英国多瑟特梅爾波利 布布时，他的父亲John Buckler II37岁，母亲Agnes Barber37岁。他于大约1538年与Margaret Martyn在英国英格兰戴文米爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1567年3月30日在英国多瑟特享年52岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特列可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Buckler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of buckles, Middle English bokeler, Old French bouclier (see Buckle ). Perhaps in some instances a nickname for a fencer, from Middle English bokeler-player.

variants.name: Buckle
meanings: English: metonymic occupational name for a maker of buckles or a nickname given to someone who wore a distinctive buckle, from Middle English bokel ‘buckle’.
English: habitational name from either Buckwell in Ashburnham (Sussex) or Buckwell in Kent.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Allex
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alan  , in Britain generally found only as a surname, but in North America equally common as a given name.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Allex Buckler was born about 1516, in Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England, his father, John Buckler II, was 37 and his mother, Agnes Barber, was 37. He married Margaret Martyn about 1538, in Milber, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 30 March 1567, in Dorset, England, at the age of 52, and was buried in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Allex Buckler est né environ 1516, à Melbury Bubb, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Buckler II, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes Barber, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Martyn environ 1538, à Milber, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 mars 1567, à Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Lewcombe, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Allex Buckler um 1516 in Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Buckler II 37 und seine Mutter Agnes Barber 37. Er hat um 1538 in Milber, Devon, England, United Kingdom Margaret Martyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. März 1567 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Dorset, England und wurde in Lewcombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Allex Buckler è nato il circa 1516 nel Melbury Bubb, Dorset, England, il suo padre, John Buckler II, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Barber, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Martyn circa 1538, nel Milber, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 marzo 1567, nel Dorset, England, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Lewcombe, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Allex Bucklerが約1516年にイギリスドールセトメルブリー ブブで生まれた時，父John Buckler IIは37歳，母Agnes Barberは37歳であった。約1538年にイギリスイギリスデボンミルバーでMargaret Martynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1567年3月30日にイギリスドールセトで52歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトルコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Allex Buckler(이)가 대략 1516년 영국 도르세트 멜버이 버브브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Buckler II(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Barber(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 미버에서 Margaret Martyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1567년 3월 30일 영국 도르세트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 루코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Allex Buckler nasceu aproximadamente 1516, em Melbury Bubb, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Buckler II, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Barber, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Martyn aproximadamente 1538, em Milber, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 30 de março de 1567, em Dorset, Inglaterra, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Allex Buckler родился около 1516 г. в местности мелбури бубб, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Buckler II было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Barber, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Martyn около 1538 г. в местности милбир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 марта 1567 г. в местности дорсет, Англия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности львкомб, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Allex Buckler nació aproximadamente 1516, en Melbury Bubb, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Buckler II, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes Barber, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margaret Martyn aproximadamente 1538, en Milber, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1567, en Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Lewcombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
